## Fast CI Results
The fast CI suite ran and **completed most checks successfully, but failed due to Prettier formatting issues**:
### Summary
- **Lint**: PASSED - **Format Check**: PASSED (1661 files already formatted) - **Prettier Check**: FAILED - Code style issues found in 2 markdown files - **Markdown Check**: PASSED - **Exec Reference Check**: PASSED - **Type Check (ty)**: PASSED - **Unit Tests (erk)**: PASSED - 5847 passed in 22.87s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: PASSED - 136 passed in 4.45s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: PASSED - 115 passed in 0.83s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: PASSED - 24 passed
### Prettier Issues
The following 2 markdown files need formatting:
1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These files can be fixed by running `prettier --write` on them. All other checks and tests passed successfully.
